First Post!

06 Jun 2015 on thriller, comedy, and horror

Hello World! This is the first post of my blog. I have decided to start this blog because I found I really need a place to post thoughts and ideas that come up with my mind recently. Here, I will try to blog about technologies, ideas, and maybe some ponderings about my life so far.

This blog(or site) is built with Jekyll, a static blog generator, whose repo can be found here. I think it is a very good tool for blogging, as it generates all the pages for you and allows you to blog in Markdown, which is very handy. It even supports Pygments, allowing you to do code highlighting, like this:

_='_=%r;print(_%%_)';print(_%_)

Dian Chen

Here goes the author description. You might want to place some links too in here

Made with Jekyll using Kasper theme
